title: Dash
description: A dashing mod that adds a new enchantment for boots that will allow you to overcome impassable places.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6671b4c18fe1a596f37655a509da69774a83cfa.png)


**A dashing mod that adds a new enchantment for boots that will allow you to overcome impassable places.**

## How to use
After you put on the enchantment boots, you will have a positive effect that will signal you that your dash is ready for use, make a jump for more efficiency and press R to perform the action.

## How to get enchantment
The Dash enchantment can be obtained by enchanting the boots on the enchantment table.


## Management
If you are not comfortable with the control, you can always change it in the settings.

![dash_key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58ed6957111ba1a013b81ba10dce848291a60073.jpeg)

##
